cherry.name: Cherry
cherry.description: A plump, juicy cherry from a Fruit Tree.

grain.name: Grain
grain.description: Squeezed from a chicken. Don't ask.

meat.name: Meat
meat.description: Nibbled off a friendly pig. It didn't seem to mind.

wood.description: A sturdy plank from a Wood Tree.
